contactMethod.label: How should we reach you first?

validation.minimum: Enter a value at or above the minimum.
validation.maximum: Enter a value at or below the maximum.
validation.accept: You must accept this option to continue.

language.title: Real immigration attorneys, on your side.
language.description: Matched with a licensed U.S. attorney who focuses on cases like yours.

focus.title: The right lawyer for your exact case.
focus.description: Immigration law is dozens of different cases. We connect you with an attorney who focuses on exactly yours.
focus.summary: A network of hundreds of vetted attorneys.

communication.title: The difference is communication.
communication.description: The hardest part of immigration is the silence. We remove it.
communication.reply: Good news — your RFE response is ready. Please look over it.
communication.summary: A case specialist who knows your file, and answers your questions — usually within hours, not weeks.

price.title: The difference is price.
price.description: AI made legal work faster and cheaper. We're the ones who pass it on.
price.summary: We built our company around AI from day one, and we pass the savings to you: on average 20% lower fees, quoted upfront. No hourly surprises.

case.title: Tell us about your case.
case.description: Choose the closest match — you can explain the details in the next step.

options.label: Family
options.description: I want to bring or join family in the U.S.

options.label: Work & Business
options.description: I want to work, invest, or start a business in the U.S.

options.label: Protection
options.description: I need safety or humanitarian help.

options.label: Defense
options.description: I’m facing deportation, a denial, or another legal issue.

options.label: Not sure / Other
options.description: My situation doesn’t fit — or I don’t know where to start.

topics: Who do you want to bring or join — a spouse, parent, child, sibling, or fiancé(e)?
What's your current status, and where is your family member right now?
Are you a U.S. citizen, a green card holder, or neither yet?
Have you filed a petition for them before, or would this be the first time?
Anything else — a wedding, a move, children's ages, or a deadline coming up?
What do you want to do in the U.S. — work for a company, invest, or start something?
What's your current status and where are you now?
What's your professional background or field?
Do you have an employer, investors, or a business already?
Anything else that might help to obtain visa?
What are you seeking protection from — persecution, violence, or danger back home?
What's your current status, and how and when did you enter the U.S.?
Have you been harmed or threatened, or are you afraid to go back?
Have you applied for asylum or any protection before, or spoken with authorities?
Anything else — a filing deadline, family here with you, or evidence you already have?
What are you facing — a deportation case, a denied application, or something else?
Do you have a court date, hearing, or deadline coming up, and when is it?
What's your current status, and are you detained or free right now?
Has a judge, an officer, or another attorney been involved so far?
Anything else — past applications, documents you've received, or prior legal issues?
What's going on — what made you look for immigration help right now?
What's your current status, and where are you at the moment?
What would you ideally like to happen, even if you're not sure it's possible?
Is anything urgent — a deadline, a letter, or a date you're worried about?
Anything else you think we should know? You can start anywhere.

record.title: Describe your situation — in your own words.
record.description: Speak in any language. Talk to us like you'd talk to a friend. The more you share, the better we can pair you with the right attorney.
record.addMore: Tap the mic to add more
record.recordingHint: Need a moment? Tap stop, breathe, and continue in a new recording — you can record up to {{count}}.

errors.unsupported: Audio recording is not supported in this browser. Try a current browser over a secure connection.
errors.permissionDenied: Microphone access was denied. Allow microphone access in your browser settings and try again.
errors.noDevice: No microphone was found. Connect a microphone and try again.
errors.deviceBusy: The microphone is unavailable or being used by another application. Close it there and try again.
errors.security: The browser blocked microphone access for security reasons. Open this page over HTTPS and try again.
errors.recordingFailed: The recording stopped unexpectedly. Please try again.
errors.tooShort: That recording was too short. Please try again and speak for a moment before stopping.
errors.maxRecordings: You can add up to 5 recordings. Delete one to record another.
errors.unknown: We couldn't access the microphone. Check its connection and browser permissions, then try again.
Something went wrong while processing the recordings. Your recordings are still here, so you can try again.

result.title: Here's what we heard.
result.description: Read it over and fix anything we got wrong — every detail helps your attorney understand your case.

contact.title: Last step — where can we reach you?
contact.description: Your Case manager will contact you here.

timeline.title: Usually within 1-2 business days
timeline.description: Your Case manager reviews your story.

timeline.title: A short intro call
timeline.description: We schedule a call with your Case manager to clarify the details.

timeline.title: Your attorney
timeline.description: We pair you with a lawyer who handles cases exactly like yours.

timeline.title: Your plan
timeline.description: A clear assessment and an upfront price. No obligation.

contact.whatsapp: We'll reach you on WhatsApp soon
contact.telegram: We'll reach you on Telegram soon
contact.sms: We'll reach you via SMS soon
